nasb.text: a corrector of the foolish, a teacher of the immature, having in the Law the embodiment of knowledge and of the truth,

esv.text: an instructor of the foolish, a teacher of children, having in the law the embodiment of knowledge and truth—

cnv.text: 愚昧人的導師，小孩子的教師，在律法上得了整套的知識和真理；

ccb.text: 愚昧人的师傅、小孩子的老师，因为你从律法中得到了知识和真理。

csbs.text: 是愚妄人的导师，是小孩子的教师，拥有着律法上知识和真理的规范，
